ew_context: Ethereum finding support at critical 61.8% Fibonacci retracement suggests completion of corrective wave 2 or B wave — ideal entry for wave 3 or C wave impulse higher
pattern_desc: Textbook Fibonacci 61.8% retracement bounce from 2140.18 level with strong momentum confirmation. EMA20 above EMA50 and RSI at healthy 54.6% support bullish reversal
invalidation: Break below 1941.72 on D1 timeframe would violate the Fibonacci support and target deeper retracement levels
market_context: Crypto sector benefiting from Bitcoin strength above $75k and positive regulatory developments. ETH showing relative strength at key technical level
full_analysis:
## Market Structure & Technical Context

Ethereum has found precise support at the critical 61.8% Fibonacci retracement level of 2140.18, marking an ideal reversal zone for the next impulse wave higher. This Fibonacci level represents the golden ratio retracement that often marks wave 2 or corrective B wave completions. EMA20 at 2259.36 above EMA50 at 2215.11 confirms the underlying bullish trend remains intact, while current price action shows strong bounce characteristics from this mathematical support.

RSI at 54.6% indicates healthy momentum without overbought conditions, providing room for sustained upside. ATR of 99.23 reflects elevated but manageable volatility, while turbulent flow dynamics with momentum alignment suggest impulsive move developing.

## Key Levels

- **Resistance**: 2264.14 (Fibonacci 38.2% resistance), 2464.78 (prior high and measured target)
- **Support**: 2140.18 (Fibonacci 61.8% golden ratio support), 1939.53 (swing low and structural support)

## Invalidation Level

Break below 1941.72 on D1 timeframe would violate the Fibonacci retracement thesis and likely target the 78.6% level around 1800.

## Macro & Flow Context

Crypto sector experiencing renewed strength with Bitcoin reclaiming $75k amid Iran ceasefire optimism and positive regulatory developments. ETH showing relative strength at this critical technical juncture, supported by strong on-chain fundamentals.
